tags.name: Farnham Station Forecourt
tags.wheelchair:description: Step-free to stop N opposite via humped crossing, No tactile markings. Steep route to station platforms.

tags.name: Farnham Station Forecourt
tags.wheelchair:description: Step-free to stop M opposite via humped crossing - NO tactile markings. Step-free, steep route to station platforms.

tags.name: Mead Lane (opp)
tags.wheelchair:description: Step-free to stop opposite via drop kerb at Old Town Mews, 70m west.

tags.name: Mead Lane (opp)
tags.wheelchair:description: Step-free to opposite stop, 70m east, via drop kerb at Old Town Mews

tags.name: The Hart (adj)
tags.wheelchair:description: Step-free to opposite stop, Downing Street (Stop C) via pedestrian lights at Post Office, or Island crossing 200m east.

tags.name: Borough
tags.wheelchair:description: One way system, no opposite stop. Step-free to shops opposite via controlled crossing 25m to west.

tags.name: Downing Street (Stop C)
tags.wheelchair:description: Step free to opposite stops: The Borough (A) and The Hart, via island crossing nearby

tags.name: Union Road
tags.wheelchair:description: Some routes terminate here. Step-free to all stops on one way system, but no directly opposite stop. Accessible toilet in park 100m

tags.name: South Street
tags.wheelchair:description: In one way system, so no "opposite stop". Step-free to all nearby shop entrances, including Sainsbury's.

tags.name: Castle Street
tags.wheelchair:description: Kerb/cobbled ramp on opposite makes Step-free access to stop E (southbound) difficult.

tags.name: Castle Street
tags.wheelchair:description: Kerb and cobbled ramp nearby make Step-free access to stop D (northbound) difficult.

tags.name: Farnham Railway Station
tags.wheelchair:description: Step-free to platform 2 (from London). Route to Platform 1 (to London)  via uneven level crossing and steep footway.

tags.name: Farnham Railway Station
tags.wheelchair:description: Not easily step free to opposite stop or station.
